summary: All 8 criteria pass (independent verify). build/typecheck/lint clean; 15 new helper tests + all fleet suites green. .bak holds prior bytes (rename before atomic write); missing/corrupt sidecar no-throw→generic notice; injected clock → deterministic relative-age; sidecar/.bak derived from outPath (--out isolation verified); manifest FleetManifestSchema-valid with NO provenance keys; --yes gate + write-and-stop unchanged; only 5 files changed (manifest.ts/decomposer*/critic-deep/runFleet untouched). 6 pre-existing cockpit E2E MCP failures unrelated.
